skill.name: Sales Automator
skill.description: Draft cold emails, follow-ups, and proposal templates. Creates pricing pages, case studies, and sales scripts. Use PROACTIVELY for sales outreach or lead nurturing.
skill.summary: AI-powered sales automation assistant for drafting cold emails, follow-ups, proposals, and sales scripts.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Prompt-only skill containing only documentation and instructions. Static analysis scanned 0 files (0 lines) and detected 0 security issues. No executable code, no network requests, no filesystem access, and no external command execution. Risk score: 0/100.

content.value_statement: Create professional cold emails, follow-ups, and proposals in minutes instead of hours. This skill helps sales teams craft personalized outreach that converts.
actual_capabilities: Draft cold email sequences with personalization variables
Create follow-up campaigns and engagement cadences
Write case studies and social proof content
Develop sales scripts with objection handling
limitations: Does not send emails or integrate with email platforms
Does not access CRM data or customer databases
Does not track email opens or click metrics
Templates require manual customization for brand voice

use_cases.title: Startup Sales Team Outreach
use_cases.description: Generate a complete cold email sequence for reaching out to potential B2B customers, including subject lines and follow-up cadence.

use_cases.title: Freelancer Proposal Creation
use_cases.description: Create professional proposal templates and case studies to include with client deliverables.

use_cases.title: Enterprise Lead Nurturing
use_cases.description: Develop multi-touch nurture campaigns to maintain relationships with existing leads.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Cold Email
prompt_templates.prompt: Write a cold email to introduce our [product/service] to [target company]. Focus on one key pain point and include a clear call to action.

prompt_templates.title: Follow-up Sequence
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 3-email follow-up sequence for a prospect who did not respond to the initial cold email. Include personalization for each touchpoint.

prompt_templates.title: Objection Handling Script
prompt_templates.prompt: Write sales call scripts that handle common objections for [industry/product], including responses about pricing, timing, and competitor concerns.

prompt_templates.title: Case Study Template
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a case study template showcasing [client type] results. Include challenge, solution, and metrics sections.

output_examples.input: Write a cold email sequence for a B2B SaaS company selling project management software to marketing teams.
output_examples.output: A 5-email sequence including: initial cold email with personalization variables, value-focused second touch, social proof third email, case study fourth touch, and final low-pressure follow-up. Each email includes subject line options, body copy, and suggested CTAs.

output_examples.input: Create objection handling scripts for a software sales conversation where the prospect says the price is too high.
output_examples.output: A comprehensive script with empathy statements, value reframing, and negotiation tactics for handling pricing objections in sales conversations.

best_practices: Lead with value and specific benefits rather than feature lists
Personalize emails using research about the prospect and their company
Keep emails short and scannable with one clear call to action
anti_patterns: Using generic templates without customization for each prospect
Including too many calls to action in a single email
Focusing on product features instead of customer problems

faq.question: Does this skill send emails?
faq.answer: No, this skill generates email content and templates. You must copy the output into your email platform or CRM to send.

faq.question: Can I use this for mass email campaigns?
faq.answer: Yes, you can use the templates to create campaign content. Ensure you comply with email marketing regulations like CAN-SPAM.

faq.question: Does this integrate with specific email platforms?
faq.answer: No, this skill generates text content only. Integration with email platforms requires additional tools or custom development.

faq.question: Can I customize the tone of the emails?
faq.answer: Yes, provide context about your brand voice and target audience in the prompt for customized output.

faq.question: How many emails should a follow-up sequence have?
faq.answer: A typical sequence includes 3-5 touchpoints over 2-3 weeks. The skill can generate sequences of varying lengths based on your needs.

faq.question: Can this help with A/B testing?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill generates multiple subject line options and email variations suitable for A/B testing campaigns.
